registry_source: Tennessee SOS (tncab.tnsos.gov) - not directly retrieved; Buzzfile / SBA PPP database
notes: SAFER keyword searches for HOLSTON BUS, HOLSTON BUS CO returned zero records. Searched broader HOLSTON: no bus/passenger carrier in Bristol TN appears in SAFER. Holston Bus Company LLC is confirmed active per its website holstonbuscompany.com and 2026 Yelp/Yellowpages reviews; founded 1976 by Kenneth A Morrell, incorporated 1977 per Buzzfile. Operated ~40 routes for Sullivan County Schools before discontinuing that contract (~2018); continues serving Bristol TN schools. Received PPP loan ($94,227, retained 4 jobs) per SBA. ~8 employees, est. $790K rev. May be intrastate-only and operating without USDOT (TN intrastate school bus carriers may not be required to register with FMCSA). LLC form referenced on website ('Holston Bus Company LLC') vs Inc/Co Inc historical filings.
